title: T-009 — changeover_matrix_drafts staging table (PLE-012)
prompt:
# T-009 — changeover_matrix_drafts staging table (PLE-012)

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §17.1 PLE-012, §17.3 backlog item 3
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Introduce `changeover_matrix_drafts` staging table for the [Apply Import] preview step before [Save & Publish] commits to changeover_matrix (per PLE-012 3-stage state machine).

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/0078_changeover_matrix_drafts.sql`: CREATE TABLE changeover_matrix_drafts mirroring changeover_matrix columns + draft_id UUID + uploaded_by + uploaded_at + status TEXT IN (preview|applied|discarded) + auto_expire_at + RLS.
2. Drizzle schema entry.
3. Index on (tenant_id, status) for cleanup job.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0078_changeover_matrix_drafts.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/changeover_matrix_drafts.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/changeover-matrix-drafts.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0078 applied, when \d changeover_matrix_drafts runs, then all PLE-012 columns + status CHECK + RLS + (tenant_id, status) index exist
2. Given two tenants, when each SELECTs, then each only sees its own drafts
3. Given an INSERT with status='committed' (not in enum), when executed, then CHECK rejects

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/changeover-matrix-drafts.test.ts asserting status CHECK + RLS + index existence
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test changeover-matrix-drafts'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip RLS
- Do not allow status values outside (preview|applied|discarded)
- Do not auto-publish drafts on insert (must require explicit Save & Publish)
